description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that creates and publishes a PyPI image. The workflow triggers on published releases, push to develop and main branches with changes to setup.py or the workflow file, and pull requests to main, develop, and rc* branches. It uses two jobs: one to create a PyPI image from SHARPy distribution on ubuntu-20.04 with Python 3.10.8, and another to publish the distribution to PyPI on ubuntu-latest if the workflow is triggered by a tag push.
